'''Rigel VII''' was a heavy-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Its native sentient species, the hulking [[Rigellian]]s, were almost extinct at the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The planet was also the homeworld of the [[Rigelian Iris]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[W:c:memoryalpha:Rigel VII|Rigel VII]] also appears in ''Star Trek'' and [http://simpsons.wikia.com/wiki/Rigel_7 ''The Simpsons''].
